execution_results.executed_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_MART.VW_PRODUCT_PERFORMANCE AS
WITH dates AS (
    SELECT
        CURRENT_DATE()                                                   AS today,
        DATEADD('month', -3, CURRENT_DATE())                             AS current_q_start,
        DATEADD('month', -6, CURRENT_DATE())                             AS prev_q_start,
        DATEADD('month', -3, DATEADD('month', -6, CURRENT_DATE()))       AS prev_q_end,
        DATEADD('month', -15, CURRENT_DATE())                            AS year_ago_q_start,
        DATEADD('month', -12, CURRENT_DATE())                            AS year_ago_q_end
),
base_sales AS (
    SELECT
        fs.PRODUCT_ID,
        fs.PRODUCT_CATEGORY,
        fs.PRODUCT_SUBCATEGORY,
        fs.ORDER_DATE,
        fs.NET_AMOUNT,
        fs.QUANTITY,
        fs.ORDER_ID
    FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_DWH.FACT_SALES fs
    -- If there are status filters or other predicates commonly applied,
    -- they should be added here to reduce scanned data.
),
aggregated AS (
    SELECT
        bs.PRODUCT_ID,
        bs.PRODUCT_CATEGORY,
        bs.PRODUCT_SUBCATEGORY,
        bs.ORDER_DATE,
        SUM(bs.NET_AMOUNT)           AS revenue,
        COUNT(DISTINCT bs.ORDER_ID)  AS unique_orders,
        SUM(bs.QUANTITY)             AS units_sold,
        CASE
            WHEN SUM(bs.QUANTITY) > 0
                THEN SUM(bs.NET_AMOUNT) / NULLIF(SUM(bs.QUANTITY), 0)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS unit_price
    FROM base_sales bs
    GROUP BY
        bs.PRODUCT_ID,
        bs.PRODUCT_CATEGORY,
        bs.PRODUCT_SUBCATEGORY,
        bs.ORDER_DATE
)
SELECT
    'CURRENT_QUARTER' AS PERIOD_TYPE,
    a.PRODUCT_ID,
    a.PRODUCT_CATEGORY,
    a.PRODUCT_SUBCATEGORY,
    a.revenue        AS REVENUE,
    a.unique_orders  AS UNIQUE_ORDERS,
    a.units_sold     AS UNITS_SOLD,
    CASE
        WHEN a.units_sold > 0 THEN
            CASE
                WHEN a.unit_price > 100 THEN 'HIGH'
                WHEN a.unit_price > 50  THEN 'MEDIUM'
                ELSE 'LOW'
            END
        ELSE 'NONE'
    END AS PRICE_TIER
FROM aggregated a
CROSS JOIN dates d
WHERE a.ORDER_DATE >= d.current_q_start
  AND a.ORDER_DATE <  d.today

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'PREVIOUS_QUARTER' AS PERIOD_TYPE,
    a.PRODUCT_ID,
    a.PRODUCT_CATEGORY,
    a.PRODUCT_SUBCATEGORY,
    a.revenue        AS REVENUE,
    a.unique_orders  AS UNIQUE_ORDERS,
    a.units_sold     AS UNITS_SOLD,
    CASE
        WHEN a.units_sold > 0 THEN
            CASE
                WHEN a.unit_price > 100 THEN 'HIGH'
                WHEN a.unit_price > 50  THEN 'MEDIUM'
                ELSE 'LOW'
            END
        ELSE 'NONE'
    END AS PRICE_TIER
FROM aggregated a
CROSS JOIN dates d
WHERE a.ORDER_DATE >= d.prev_q_start
  AND a.ORDER_DATE <  d.prev_q_end

UNION ALL

SELECT
    'YEAR_AGO_QUARTER' AS PERIOD_TYPE,
    a.PRODUCT_ID,
    a.PRODUCT_CATEGORY,
    a.PRODUCT_SUBCATEGORY,
    a.revenue        AS REVENUE,
    a.unique_orders  AS UNIQUE_ORDERS,
    a.units_sold     AS UNITS_SOLD,
    CASE
        WHEN a.units_sold > 0 THEN
            CASE
                WHEN a.unit_price > 100 THEN 'HIGH'
                WHEN a.unit_price > 50  THEN 'MEDIUM'
                ELSE 'LOW'
            END
        ELSE 'NONE'
    END AS PRICE_TIER
FROM aggregated a
CROSS JOIN dates d
WHERE a.ORDER_DATE >= d.year_ago_q_start
  AND a.ORDER_DATE <  d.year_ago_q_end
